allow: PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI"; gh auth status 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Item "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Item "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($tmp = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName\(\); Set-Content -Path $tmp -Value '{"source":{"branch":"main","path":"/"}}' -Encoding utf8; Get-Content $tmp | & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api repos/rebeccasegolin/ruivagarimpeira/pages --method POST --input - 2>&1; Remove-Item $tmp)

PowerShell($tmp = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName\(\) + ".json"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($tmp, '{"source":{"branch":"main","path":"/"}}', [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api repos/rebeccasegolin/ruivagarimpeira/pages --method POST --input $tmp 2>&1; Remove-Item $tmp)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api repos/rebeccasegolin/ruivagarimpeira/deployments --jq '.[0] | {state: .statuses_url, env: .environment, created: .created_at, sha: .sha}' 2>&1)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" api repos/rebeccasegolin/ruivagarimpeira/pages/builds --jq '.[0] | {status: .status, commit: .commit, error: .error}' 2>&1)
